mission.title: harbor: EXECUTION_SWEEP job queue is growing
mission.description: EXECUTION_SWEEP job queue is growing. This issue affects 8+ users.

steps.title: Identify harbor analyze symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your harbor deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=harbor
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for error: `failed to delete executions: ERROR: update or delete on table "execution" violates foreign key constraint "task_executio`

steps.title: Check current resource configuration
steps.description: Inspect the relevant harbor resources: ```bash kubectl get resource -A kubectl describe resource -n ``` Hello We are seeing a problem with the growth of the job queue for the EXECUTION_SWEEP job type.

steps.title: Apply the fix for EXECUTION_SWEEP job queue is growing
steps.description:
Reduce the execution sweep job frequency from hourly to daily.

Thank you for contributing to Harbor!

# Comprehensive Summary of your change

# Issue being fixed
Fixes https://github.com/goharbor/harbor/issues/20255

Please indicate you've done the following:
```yaml
2024-04-09T22:29:53Z [INFO] [/pkg/task/sweep_job.go:91]: start to run sweep job
2024-04-09T22:29:54Z [INFO] [/pkg/task/sweep_job.go:150]: [IMAGE_SCAN] start to sweep, retain latest 1 executions
2024-04-10T00:54:09Z [INFO] [/pkg/task/sweep_job.go:180]: [IMAGE_SCAN] end to sweep, 0 executions were deleted in total, elapsed time: 2h24m14.915320345s
2024-04-10T00:54:09Z [INFO] [/pkg/task/sweep_job.go:160]: [IMAGE_SCAN] listed 0 candidate executions for sweep
2024-04-10T00:54:09Z [INFO] [/pkg/task/sweep_job.go:150]: [P2P_PREHEAT] start to sweep, retain latest 50 executions
2024-04-10T00:54:09Z
```

steps.title: Confirm EXECUTION_SWEEP job queue is growing is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that `failed to delete executions: ERROR: update or delete on table "execution" violates foreign key constraint "task_executio` no longer appears in logs.

resolution.summary:
The root cause is: Reduce the execution sweep job frequency from hourly to daily.

Thank you for contributing to Harbor!

# Comprehensive Summary of your change

# Issue being fixed
Fixes https://github.com/goharbor/harbor/issues/20255

Please indicate you've done the following:. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.
